title: FishMod
description:
FishMod — SkyBlock dungeon mod

Splits, crypt tracker, puzzle display
Death messages & lag tracker
Party commands (.pb, .cata, .fps…)
Hub warp map HUD
body:
FishMod is a Hypixel SkyBlock client-side utility mod for Fabric 1.21. It's designed as a companion to blade-addons but runs fully standalone. All features are toggleable and configurable via the in-game settings screen (Right Shift).

Warp Map
When you're near the Hub map wall, colored dots are projected onto your HUD showing every warp destination. Aim your crosshair at any dot and left-click to instantly send the /warp command — no typing required. The dot highlights when your crosshair is on it so you always know what you're about to warp to.

Dungeon Split Timer — Est. Total
Adds an "Est. Total" row beneath the dungeon split timer that shows your predicted finish time in real time. It uses your personal average for each split (learned from your own runs) and falls back to global averages when you don't have personal data yet. The color of the estimate indicates confidence — cyan means fully personal, yellow means mixed, gray means all fallback. Lag is automatically subtracted from the projection so it stays accurate even on laggy servers.

Lag Tracker
Measures actual server lag during dungeon runs by comparing wall-clock time to the server tick count. When a run ends it can automatically send the lag total to party chat (Xs lost to lag), so your team knows without you having to say anything.

Party Commands
Responds to dot-commands typed in party chat. Useful for quickly sharing stats or managing the party without leaving the game:

.pb — fetches and posts your M7 personal best to party
.cata — posts catacombs level and XP to next level
.rtca — calculates and posts runs-to-class-average-50 for all 5 classes
.fps / .tps / .ping — posts your current FPS, real server TPS, and ping
.ai / .allinv — toggles all-invite
.d — disbands the party
.f1–.f7 / .m1–.m7 / .e — sends a /joininstance for the specified floor (with a 30-second cooldown after entering a dungeon to avoid accidents)
.t1–.t5 — joins the specified Kuudra tier
All commands are individually toggleable. Stat lookups (.pb, .cata, .rtca) require your Hypixel API key to be set in config.

Death Messages
When a player dies in a dungeon, FishMod sends a configurable message to party or local chat. The default is {name} died like a bum but you can set it to anything. The {name} placeholder is replaced with the dead player's IGN.

Soulflow HUD
Reads your soulflow balance from the tab list and displays it on your HUD. You can set a warning threshold — if your soulflow drops below it, the display turns red. Useful for enderman slayer or any content where running out of soulflow mid-grind is a problem.

Slayer XP Tracker
Tracks slayer kills and XP over a rolling 1-hour window and displays XP/hr and bosses/hr on your HUD while a boss is active. Automatically applies the Aatrox 1.25× XP multiplier when Aatrox is mayor, so the numbers reflect what you're actually earning.

Powder Tracker
Reads mithril, gemstone, and glacite powder totals from the scoreboard sidebar in Dwarven Mines, Crystal Hollows, and Mineshaft, then calculates and displays each powder type's rate per hour on your HUD. Works by detecting changes in the totals over time.

Bridge Bot
If your guild uses a Discord bridge bot, FishMod can reformat its messages from the raw bot format into clean, readable [Bridge] Player: message lines that match the style of normal guild chat. Configure the bot's IGN in settings and it handles the rest.

Config: Right Shift opens the settings screen. HUD positions are drag-and-drop. Requires a Hypixel API key for stat lookup commands.
